recapPrompt.prompt: What is one of the strongest clues that prefix sums might help?

choices.label: The problem keeps asking many sum or cumulative questions
choices.feedback: Correct. Prefix sums help when repeated totals would otherwise repeat work.

choices.label: The problem only asks for one simple comparison with no totals
choices.feedback: Not this one. Prefix sums are strongest when totals keep appearing.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain how prefix sums save time by reusing earlier work.
